sourceNote: TCGplayer / eBay Authentication Center study (Peter Day, published 2025-07-21): Black Bolt and White Flare data combined into one 700+ pack sample on the stated assumption the two split sets share rates — Double Rare 21.11% ±2.98, Ultra Rare 5.83% ±1.71, Illustration Rare 16.39% ±2.70, Special Illustration Rare 1.25% ±0.81. Confidence is capped at MEDIUM: the sample is much smaller than a normal study (wide CIs) and the sets are combined. Illustration Rares are ~1 in 6 (twice the usual rate) but there are 69 of them. The Black White Rare chase (Zekrom ex / Victini) is reported as UNKNOWN — the study found zero in 700 packs — so its slot uses an estimated ~1 in 1,600, included only so the tier's value isn't dropped from EV; treat it as indicative. Poke Ball / Master Ball reverse-holo foils (~30% and ~5% of packs) are not modelled: pokemontcg.io lists them as price variants, not separate cards.
